Meta.defaultTitle: Inácio Rodrigues — Full Stack Developer & Computer Engineer
Meta.defaultDescription: Senior Full Stack Developer and Computer Engineer (UFC). Technical and architectural decisions in mission-critical, highly available systems.
Meta.keywords: full stack developer, computer engineer, fortaleza, brazil, typescript, next.js, kubernetes, devops

Home.heroSubtitle: I build mission-critical, highly available systems with Kubernetes, DevOps and resilient architecture. Currently developing my thesis on real-time teleoperation with low-latency UDP communication.
Home.ctaGithubRepo: Check out the source code of this portfolio on GitHub
Home.currentRole: Senior Systems Developer at B&Q Energia
Home.currentEducation: Graduating in Computer Engineering at UFC
Home.highlightProjectsDescription: Thesis on teleoperation, internal production systems and open-source side projects.
Home.highlightSkillsDescription: TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js, Python, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, embedded systems.
Home.highlightExperienceDescription: Technical and architectural decisions in highly critical environments.

About.title: About
About.subtitle: Computer Engineer (UFC), Senior Full Stack Developer
About.objectives: Expertise across all project stages, from concept to software and hardware development. I pursue code quality, maximum performance and an enhanced user experience with emphasis on accessibility. My multidisciplinary background allows me to deliver innovative, high-end solutions.
About.summary: I'm a Senior Full Stack Developer graduating in Computer Engineering at UFC, working in development, evolution and maintenance of critical systems. I lead technical and architectural decisions, from concept to deployment, on highly available applications, DevOps practices and resilient architectures.
About.summarySecondary: I have an analytical, multidisciplinary profile, with experience in corporate systems, educational platforms and innovation projects. I'm developing my thesis on real-time systems and teleoperation with low-latency communication, integrating software, hardware and infrastructure, with focus on performance, scalability and reliability.

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.subtitle: Selected work
Projects.description: A mix of thesis work, production systems at B&Q Energia and NeuroArq Academy, and public side projects on GitHub.

teleoperacao.title: Teleoperation System with Force Feedback
teleoperacao.subtitle: Thesis — UFC, 2026
teleoperacao.description: Real-time remote control system with low-latency UDP communication, integrating Raspberry Pi, ESP32, telemetry, live video and haptic interface (force feedback). Combines software, hardware and distributed systems.

beq.title: B&Q Energia internal platforms
beq.subtitle: 2024 — present
beq.description: Maintenance and evolution of critical applications for inspection monitoring, workforce management and goal tracking. Multi-cluster Kubernetes architecture, high availability and DevOps practices.

neuroarq.title: NeuroArq Academy platform
neuroarq.subtitle: 2024 — present
neuroarq.description: Development and evolution of NeuroArq's educational platforms, with focus on performant applications and modern internal solutions.

portfolio.title: This portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Open source
portfolio.description: Next.js 16, App Router, next-intl (PT/EN/ES), Tailwind CSS v4, server actions, GTM with Consent Mode v2. Source available on GitHub.

beqSr.description: Senior Full Stack Developer responsible for developing, evolving and maintaining the company's systems. I lead most technical and architectural decisions — from concept to deploy, defining stacks, patterns and infrastructure strategies. High-criticality projects: inspection monitoring, workforce management, goals and internal controls. Highly available environments on Kubernetes, multi-cluster and DevOps practices.

beqJr.description: Developed new features and maintained existing applications, gaining expertise in critical system maintenance.

neuroarq.description: Development and evolution of educational platforms and modern, performant internal solutions.

ufc.title: Bachelor in Computer Engineering
ufc.description: Thesis: "Teleoperation System with Force Feedback for RC Vehicle" — real-time remote control with low-latency UDP, Raspberry Pi and ESP32. Participated in the University Extension Program (PREX) with research on anthropometric and hematological indicators. HackPI Ceará 2021. SETIC mini-courses: Network Authentication and Convolutional Neural Networks with TensorFlow.

Cookie.title: Cookies and privacy
Cookie.description: I use cookies to understand who visits the portfolio (Google Analytics via GTM). No personal data is collected and consent expires in 180 days.

Privacy.title: Privacy policy
Privacy.intro: This page describes how inaciorodrigues.dev.br handles data during a visit or contact.
Privacy.section1: On visits, only anonymous data via Google Analytics (after consent): country, browser, pages visited. On contact form, only name, email and message provided by the visitor.
Privacy.section2: Aggregated usage statistics (no individual identification) and direct reply to contacts.
Privacy.section3: No data is sold. The email provider (SMTP) is the only third party involved in delivering messages.
Privacy.section4: You can request access, correction or deletion of your data at any time via email.
Privacy.section5: For questions or requests regarding data, email inaciormgalvao@outlook.com.

Terms.title: Terms of use
Terms.intro: By accessing this site you agree to the terms below.
Terms.section1: Written content (texts, project descriptions) is my own. The portfolio source code is open source on GitHub under the MIT license.
Terms.section2: Company logos (B&Q Energia, NeuroArq Academy, UFC, etc.) belong to their respective owners and are shown only as professional reference.
Terms.section3: I work to keep information accurate, but I'm not responsible for decisions made based on this site's content.
